name: sunset-erp
description: Sunset ERP monorepo root — DX scripts only; apps live in backend/ and frontend/

scripts.dev: bash scripts/check-services.sh && sleep 2 && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green --kill-others-on-fail "pnpm run dev:backend" "sleep 8 && pnpm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: pnpm --dir backend build && pnpm --dir frontend build
